submissions.title: Vendor onboarding approval assistant
submissions.business_problem: Vendor onboarding checks are fragmented across documents, emails, and finance systems.
submissions.agentops_relevance: Good fit for evidence, approval, policy, audit, and sandbox connector demonstration.
submissions.expected_value: Reduce onboarding cycle time and improve auditability.

submissions.title: HR policy exception review agent
submissions.business_problem: Employees ask for policy exceptions that require document evidence and escalation.
submissions.agentops_relevance: Tests human approval, sensitivity control, evidence vault, and model-risk review.
submissions.expected_value: Improve consistency of policy review and escalation.

submissions.title: Contract renewal risk review agent
submissions.business_problem: Contract renewals need evidence review, approval, and audit trail.
submissions.agentops_relevance: Requires governance, policy, audit, and approval controls.
submissions.expected_value: Reduce manual review effort while preserving risk controls.
